tool.name: create_tool
tool.description:
Scaffold a new Ziro tool — implementation .py + schema XML + __init__.py + auto-register in ziro/tools/__init__.py.
parameters: list of {name, type, required, description} dicts. implementation_body: Python code for the function body (must return dict with "success" key). After creation, panel restart or importlib.reload makes the tool live.
Enables a UI wizard flow: client fills form -> POST /api/tools/create -> tool scaffolded and registered.

parameter.name: parameters
parameter.description: List of {name, type, required, description} dicts.
